## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, integration pages, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages need prioritization and refinement, focusing on tier 1 content first](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [New approach for integration pages: summarize, link to official docs, and use AI for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Content updates ongoing: 40 articles published, 7 in drafts, 10 refreshes completed](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends with increased clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Positive trends in SEO metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Clicks increased by \~8,000 week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=8000.0)
      - [Impressions up by nearly 8,000](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=8000.0)
  - [New charts introduced:](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Cumulative clicks and impressions over 8-9 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Weekly growth in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [E-commerce and plugin articles performing well, aligning with current content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Integration Pages Strategy

  - [33 integration pages ready in total, across 4 batches](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Issues with draft pages showing in production resolved](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New approach discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [Prioritize pages into tiers (1, 2, 3)](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Focus on programming languages and frameworks (e.g., Remix, Astro)](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [Summarize integration info, link to official documentation when available](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [Use AI for content generation, with human review](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Maxime to lead tier 1 page updates, other tiers potentially delegated](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [New Airtable tab to be created for tracking integration page priorities and updates](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

### Content Updates and Refreshes

  - [40 articles published in total, 7 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2098.0)
  - [10 new refreshes completed, focusing on content expansion and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Ongoing efforts to incorporate Strapi V5 references in new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2130.0)
  - [New V2 refresh workflow launched, not yet implemented](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create new Airtable tab for integration page prioritization by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Maxime to stack-rank integration pages into tiers](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [GrowthX team to scrape and source unique content from third-party integration websites](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)
  - [Review and provide feedback on 7 draft articles](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Implement new V2 refresh workflow for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2248.0)
  - [Continue optimizing metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/d-aUT9_mWzMaMLi_F-Eq5sJy1zAmxV7A?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
